spots.title: Wire the DeepBook SDK client from the deployment manifest
spots.prompt: In `src/App.tsx` lines 39–58, implement the three helper functions (`packageIds`, `coinMap`, `poolMap`) that extract DeepBook SDK config from the sandbox deployment manifest, and the `useMemo` hook that constructs the `SuiGrpcClient` extended with `deepbook(...)`. Use {{ pool_subset }} as the set of pools to wire. The manifest shape is defined by the `Manifest` interface above. Refer to the doc links for PTB inputs/results and the gRPC client API.
